description: Poster in a high-contrast black, gold, and white color scheme. The right side shows a shadowed photograph of Donald Trump walking forward in a dark suit, white shirt, and tie, wearing a white 'USA' baseball cap and clenching his right fist; a large American flag is faintly visible behind him and two suited figures appear small in the lower-right background. The left side carries bold distressed slab type stacked as a slogan: 'COMPANIES' (white) over 'ARE' (white, flanked by gold stars) over 'COMING HOME' (large gold). At the bottom left is the embossed Department of Labor seal next to 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR' and a row of gold stars. The tweet text includes 'biggest reshoring wave in U.S. history' and 'Promises Made. Promises Kept.'
notable_text: COMPANIES ARE COMING HOME; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF LABOR
